content:
Every courtroom carries its own set of facts, challenges, and responsibilities. Today, I had the privilege of appearing before the District & Sessions Court, Sheikhpura, Bihar, in an anticipatory bail matter.
Moments like these are a reminder that effective advocacy is built on thorough preparation, sound legal reasoning, and unwavering commitment to the client's cause.
Grateful for the trust reposed in me and for every opportunity to learn, grow, and contribute to the administration of justice.
The journey continues. ⚖️
